title: Evidence standard
doc_html:
§2105. Evidence standard

            Sharing a cyber threat indicator or defensive measure information shall not constitute a waiver of any applicable privilege or protection provided pursuant to the Louisiana Code of Evidence.

            Acts 2019, No. 187, §1.
doc_text:
§2105.  Evidence standard
Sharing a cyber threat indicator or defensive measure information shall not constitute
a waiver of any applicable privilege or protection provided pursuant to the Louisiana Code
of Evidence.
Acts 2019, No. 187, §1.
